analysis.reasoning: Core message: Expresses solidarity with indigenous peoples worldwide on International Day of the World's Indigenous Peoples, noting their heightened vulnerability due to the coronavirus pandemic. Evaluation: EU1 (EU as a successful story) – not referenced; no mention of EU history or success. EU2 (EU united) – no reference to EU unity or internal solidarity among member states. EU3 (EU useful for its citizens) – focuses on global indigenous peoples, not EU-internal policy benefits. EU4 (EU avant-garde) – no claim of EU leadership or pioneering action. EU5 (EU global champion of fair causes) – the tweet supports a fair cause (indigenous rights) but does not attribute leadership, action, or advocacy specifically to the EU; it merely expresses solidarity without linking to EU identity or role. EU6 (EU contributes to a better world) – no concrete EU contribution, policy, or partnership is mentioned; only a general expression of solidarity. Conclusion: The tweet does not promote any listed EU narratives.
